company_type: Public Utility Holding Company - Electric and Natural Gas

supply_chain.dependencies: Coal supply concentration - 88% from single supplier (Sunrise LLC) for Indiana Electric coal purchases; Natural gas supply from multiple suppliers with major suppliers accounting for 54% of total purchases
risks: Coal supply shortages due to labor shortages in mining industry

Severe weather events (hurricanes, tornadoes, winter storms) can increase commodity prices and reduce natural gas capacity; supply chain constraints in acquiring solar panels due to DOC antidumping investigations and Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act; concentration of natural gas suppliers; potential delays and cost increases for solar projects due to global supply chain issues

Supply chain disruptions due to geopolitical uncertainty, regulatory instability, import tariffs, labor shortages, resource availability, long lead times, manufacturer production limitations, delivery delays, inflation, severe weather events
Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act bans on goods from China's Xinjiang region
Potential tariffs and trade restrictions impacting procurement of materials and supplies
Tariffs on solar panels and equipment from China, Cambodia, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam
Concentration risk with single coal supplier

regulatory_risks: NERC, ERCOT, and MISO compliance requirements for electric operations
Hurricane Beryl investigations by Texas Governor, legislature, PUCT, and Attorney General
Public Utility Commission of Texas (PUCT) rate regulation and approval requirements
Minnesota Public Utilities Commission (MPUC) rate regulation
Rate regulation by PUCT, IURC, FERC and state commissions may delay or deny cost recovery and expected returns
Rate case proceedings with risk of cost disallowances by regulators
EPA greenhouse gas emission regulations for fossil fuel-fired electric generating units
Clean Water Act compliance for water discharges and wetlands
SEC climate-related disclosure rules (implementation subject to voluntary delay)
RCRA hazardous waste regulations
RCRA (Resource Conservation and Recovery Act) compliance for ash disposal
Proposed Texas legislation to review and potentially disallow TEEEF lease cost recovery
PIPES Act requirements for leak detection, repair programs, and emissions mitigation
Public Utilities Commission of Ohio (PUCO) rate regulation
Potential regulatory disallowances of storm restoration costs or capital investments
State and local initiatives to limit fossil fuel usage and ban natural gas appliances
Regulatory lag in recovering capital investments through rate proceedings
DOC antidumping and countervailing duty investigations on solar panels from Cambodia, Malaysia, Thailand, and Vietnam
SEC climate disclosure rules (currently stayed pending litigation)
Railroad Commission of Texas natural gas rate regulation
Mississippi Public Service Commission (MPSC) rate regulation
Minnesota Natural Gas Innovation Act regulatory framework
Clean Water Act permitting requirements for groundwater and power plant discharges
CERCLA liability for hazardous substance releases
Climate change legislation and GHG emission reduction mandates
EPA Coal Combustion Residuals Rule for ash pond management
Indiana Senate Enrolled Act 386 for securitization of generation retirements
Uyghur Forced Labor Prevention Act restrictions on solar modules from China's Xinjiang region
State and federal environmental regulations for MGP (manufactured gas plant) site remediation
Potential ring-fencing measures on Houston Electric
Environmental justice regulatory scrutiny
Texas legislation (House Bill 2555, Senate Bill 1015, Senate Bill 1016, etc.) impacting utility operations and cost recovery
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) tax provisions: production tax credits, corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT), methane emissions reduction program
Regulatory actions in response to Hurricane Beryl and May 2024 Storm Events
Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) pipeline certificate approvals
NERC reliability standards compliance and potential fines up to $1.6 million per day per violation
Wildfire liability and insurance requirements
Clean Air Act compliance and air emission restrictions
PUCT and municipal jurisdiction over Houston Electric's rates and operations
TSA pipeline security directive requirements for cybersecurity
EPA regulations: CCR Rule (coal combustion residuals), CCR Legacy Rule, Effluent Limitation Guidelines for steam electric wastewater
Securitization bond approval processes for storm cost recovery
EPA Effluent Limitation Guidelines for steam electric wastewater
Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission (IURC) rate regulation and CPCN approvals
Louisiana Public Service Commission (LPSC) rate regulation
PHMSA pipeline safety regulations under NGPSA and HLPSA

sanction_risks: Potential retaliatory trade measures against United States
US-China trade tensions affecting solar panel supply chain
Tariffs on solar cells and panels from China, Cambodia, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam
